{{INTEL
|realm=hellas
|demonym=Hellenic
|tree2=Godess' Guide
|recomended=
|intel1={{INTELRow
|no=1
|name=Olympus Myth
|req1=350
|effect1=Obtain the Sanctum Knight<br>Per Hellenic Apostle dominated, Snail ATK +5<br>Hellenic Apostles Dominated: 2/2
}}{{INTELRow
|no=2
|name=Sophist Movement
|req1=1400
|effect1=Unlock Special Cards (Hellas)<br>Card Conversion in Hellas gives +15% rewards
}}{{INTELRow
|no=3
|name=Sagittarius Apostle Clue
|req1=4200
|condition1=
|effect1=Unlock area (Sagittarius)<br>In Sagittarius, INTEL gained +20%
}}{{INTELRow
|no=4
|name=Senate System
|req1=1400
|effect1=For Hellas Incidents, AFFCT Checks -200<br>Upon traveling through an area, gain +200 INTEL
}}{{INTELRow
|no=5
|name=Textile Technique
|levels=3
|req1=5600
|condition1=
|effect1=Upgrade 1 White Thread Workshop to  {{Retext|Green|green}}
|req2=11200
|effect2=Upgrade 1 {{Retext|Green|green}} Thread Workshop to {{Retext|Blue|blue}}
|req3=16800
|effect3=Upgrade 1 {{Retext|Blue|blue}} Thread Workshop to {{Retext|Purple|purple}}
}}{{INTELRow
|no=6
|name=Leather Tech
|levels=3
|req1=5600
|effect1=Upgrade 1 White Leather Workshop to {{Retext|Green|Green}}
|req2=11200
|effect2=Upgrade 1 {{Retext|Green|green}} Leather Workshop to {{Retext|Blue|blue}}
|req3=16800
|effect3=Upgrade 1 {{Retext|Blue|blue}} Leather Workshop to {{Retext|Purple|purple}}
}}{{INTELRow
|no=7
|name=Capricorn Apostle Clue
|req1=16800
|condition1=
|effect1=Unlock area (Capricorn)<br>In Capricorn, INTEL gained +20%
}}{{INTELRow
|no=8
|name=Jeweler's Craftsmanship
|levels=3
|req1=5600
|effect1=Upgrade 1 White Crystal Workshop to {{Retext|Green|green}}
|req2=11200
|effect2=Upgrade 1 {{Retext|Green|green}} Crystal Workshop to {{Retext|Blue|blue}}
|req3=16800
|effect3=Upgrade 1 {{Retext|Blue|blue}} Crystal Workshop to {{Retext|Purple|purple}}
}}{{INTELRow
|no=9
|name=Decoration Tech
|levels=3
|req1=5600
|effect1=Upgrade 1 White Feather Workshop to {{Retext|Green|green}}
|req2=11200
|effect2=Upgrade 1 {{Retext|Green|green}} Feather Workshop to {{Retext|Blue|blue}}
|req3=16800
|effect3=Upgrade 1 {{Retext|Blue|blue}} Feather Workshop to {{Retext|Purple|purple}}
}}{{INTELRow
|no=10
|name=Speculative PHL
|levels=4
|req1=14000
|effect1=Per Hellenic key clue completed, receive Expert Scrolls +4
|req2=28000
|effect2=Per Hellenic key clue completed, receive Expert Scrolls +6
|req3=42000
|effect3=Per Hellenic key clue completed, receive Expert Scrolls +8
|req4=56000
|effect4=Per Hellenic key clue completed, receive Expert Scrolls +10
}}{{INTELRow
|no=11
|name=Byzantine Formation
|levels=4
|req1=14000
|condition1=
|effect1=In Hellas, DMG +5%
|req2=28000
|effect2=In Hellas, DMG +10%
|req3=42000
|effect3=In Hellas, DMG +15%
|req4=56000
|effect4=In Hellas, DMG +20%
}}{{INTELRow
|no=12
|name=Aquarius Apostle Clue
|req1=42000
|condition1=
|effect1=Unlock area (Aquarius)<br>In Aquarius, INTEL gained +20%
}}{{INTELRow
|no=13
|name=Macedonian Phalanx
|levels=4
|req1=14000
|condition1=
|effect1=In Hellas, DMG REDUC +5%
|req2=28000
|effect2=In Hellas, DMG REDUC +10%
|req3=42000
|effect3=In Hellas, DMG REDUC +15%
|req4=56000
|effect4=In Hellas, DMG REDUC +20%
}}{{INTELRow
|no=14
|name=Hero's Epic
|levels=3
|req1=14000
|effect1=Per vicotry, Ancient Manuscripts gained +1
|req2=28000
|effect2=Per victory, Ancient Manuscripts gained +2
|req3=42000
|effect3=Per victory, Ancient Manuscripts gained +3
}}{{INTELRow
|no=15
|name=Platonism
|levels=3
|req1=18000
|effect1=Unlock more items in Hellenic Card Redemption
|req2=36000
|effect2=Unlock more items in Hellenic Card Redemption
|req3=54000
|effect3=Unlock more items in Hellenic Card Redemption
}}{{INTELRow
|no=16
|name=Byzantine Legacy
|levels=3
|req1=18000
|effect1=Learn to get {{Gearlink|purple|Exploration|Justinian's Robe}}
|req2=36000
|effect2=Learn to get {{Gearlink|purple|Exploration|Heraclius' Silver Staff}}
|req3=54000
|effect3=Learn to get {{Gearlink|purple|Exploration|Caesar's Laurel}}
}}{{INTELRow
|no=17
|name=Pisces Apostle Clue
|req1=54000
|effect1=Unlock area (Pisces)<br>In Pisces, INTEL gained +20%
}}{{INTELRow
|no=18
|name=Alexander's Conquest
|levels=3
|req1=18000
|effect1=Unlock Special Incident (To the East)
|req2=36000
|effect2=Unlock Special Incident (Persian Conquest)
|req3=54000
|effect3=Unlock Special Incident (Bharata Expedition)
}}{{INTELRow
|no=19
|name=Marathon
|levels=4
|req1=18000
|effect1=In Hellas, Travel SPD +4%<br>Learn to get 4h Travel Speedup
|req2=36000
|effect2=In Hellas, Travel SPD +8%<br>Leanr to get 6h Travel Speedup
|req3=54000
|effect3=In Hellas, Travel SPD +12%<br>Learn to get 8h Travel Speedup
|req4=72000
|effect4=In Hellas, Travel SPD +16%<br>Learn to get 12h Travel Speedup
}}
|intel2={{INTELRow
|no=1
|name=Aphrodite's Box
|levels=3
|req1=350
|effect1=Unlock Leather Lottery
|req2=700
|effect2=Unlock Crystal Lottery
|req3=1050
|effect3=Unlock Feather Lottery
}}{{INTELRow
|no=2
|name=Dancing Gala
|levels=4
|req1=1400
|effect1=Unlock Taura Arena (Posh)
|req2=2800
|effect2=Unlock Cancer Arena (Moody)
|req3=4200
|effect3=Unlock Virgo Arena (Cute)
|req4=5600
|effect4=Unlock Scorpio Arena (Wicked)
}}{{INTELRow
|no=3
|name=Mental Bond
|req1=4200
|effect1=Tap on the goddess for Favor and rewards
}}{{INTELRow
|no=4
|name=Makeup Technique
|levels=4
|req1=1400
|effect1=Per purple costume owned, receive 2 Toners<br>32/32 purple costumes acquired
|req2=2800
|effect2=Per purple costume owned, receive 4 Toners<br>32/32 purple costumes acquired
|req3=4200
|effect3=Per purple costume owned, receive 6 Toners<br>32/32 purple costumes acquired
|req4=5600
|effect4=Per purple costume owned, receive 10 Toners<br>32/32 purple costumes acquired
}}{{INTELRow
|no=5
|name=Moody Vibe
|levels=4
|req1=5600
|effect1=For all costumes, Moody +10%
|req2=11200
|effect2=For all costumes, Moody +20%
|req3=16800
|effect3=For all costumes, Moody +30%
|req4=22400
|effect4=For all costumes, Moody +40%
}}{{INTELRow
|no=6
|name=Cute Power
|levels=4
|req1=5600
|effect1=For all costumes, Cute +10%
|req2=11200
|effect2=For all costumes, Cute +20%
|req3=16800
|effect3=For all costumes, Cute +30%
|req4=22400
|effect4=For all costumes, Cute +40%
}}{{INTELRow
|no=7
|name=Beauty Bloom
|levels=4
|req1=5600
|effect1=Every Costume Stat +5%
|req2=11200
|effect2=Every Costume Stat +10%
|req3=16800
|effect3=Every Costume Stat +15%
|req4=22400
|effect4=Every Costume Stat +20%
}}{{INTELRow
|no=8
|name=Posh Lady
|levels=4
|req1=5600
|effect1=For all costumes, Posh +10%
|req2=11200
|effect2=For all costumes, Posh +20%
|req3=16800
|effect3=For all costumes, Posh +30%
|req4=22400
|effect4=For all costumes, Posh +40%
}}{{INTELRow
|no=9
|name=Wicked Girl
|levels=4
|req1=5600
|effect1=For all costumes, Wicked +10%
|req2=11200
|effect2=For all costumes, Wicked +20%
|req3=16800
|effect3=For all costumes, Wicked +30%
|req4=22400
|effect4=For all costumes, Wicked +40%
}}{{INTELRow
|no=10
|name=Collect Thread
|levels=4
|req1=14000
|effect1=Threads from Thread Workshop +10%<br>Learn to get 100 Thread
|req2=28000
|effect2=Threads from Thread Workshop +20%<br>Learn to get 200 Thread
|req3=42000
|effect3=Threads from Thread Workshop +30%<br>Learn to get 300 Thread
|req4=56000
|effect4=Threads from Thread Workshop +40%<br>Learn to get 400 Thread
}}{{INTELRow
|no=11
|name=Leather Collection
|levels=4
|req1=14000
|effect1=Leather from Leather Workshop +10%<br>Learn to get 100 Leather
|req2=28000
|effect2=Leather from Leather Workshop +20%<br>Learn to get 200 Leather
|req3=42000
|effect3=Leather from Leather Workshop +30%<br>Learn to get 300 Leather
|req4=56000
|effect4=Leather from Leather Workshop +40%<br>Learn to get 400 Leather
}}{{INTELRow
|no=12
|name=Oath of Heart
|levels=4
|req1=14000
|effect1=Per tap on Athena, Favor +1
|req2=28000
|effect2=Per tap on Athena, Favor +2
|req3=42000
|effect3=Per tap on Athena, Favor +3
|req4=56000
|effect4=Per tap on Athena, Favor +4<br>Unlock Favor Cap to Oath
}}{{INTELRow
|no=13
|name=Crystal Collection
|levels=4
|req1=14000
|effect1=Crystals from Crystal Workshop +10%<br>Learn to get 100 Crystals
|req2=28000
|effect2=Crystals fro Crystal Workshop +20%<br>Learn to get 200 Crystals
|req3=42000
|effect3=Crystals from Crystal Workshop +30%<br>Learn to get 300 Crystal
|req4=56000
|effect4=Crystals from Crystal Workshop +40%<br>Learn to get 400 Crystal
}}{{INTELRow
|no=14
|name=Feather Collection
|levels=4
|req1=14000
|effect1=Feathers from Feather Workshop +10%<br>Learn to get 100 Feather
|req2=28000
|effect2=Feathers from Feather Workshop +20%<br>Learn to get 200 Feather
|req3=42000
|effect3=Feathers from Feather Workshop +30%<br>Learn to get 300 Feather
|req4=56000
|effect4=Feathers from Feather Workshop +40%<br>Learn to get 400 Feather
}}{{INTELRow
|no=15
|name=Olympus Market
|levels=4
|req1=18000
|effect1=Unlock Costume Coin Shop<br>In Costume Lottery, Costume Coins earned +5%
|req2=36000
|effect2=In Costume Lottery, Costume Coins earned +10%
|req3=54000
|effect3=In Costume Lottery, Costume Coins earned +15%
|req4=72000
|effect4=In Costume Lottery, Costume Coins earned +20%
}}{{INTELRow
|no=16
|name=Light of Victory
|levels=4
|req1=18000
|effect1=Per Arena Conquered, receive 2 Grandmaster Scrolls<br>5/5 Arena Conquered
|req2=36000
|effect2=Per Arena Conquered, receive 4 Grandmaster Scrolls<br>5/5 Arena Conquered
|req3=54000
|effect3=Per Arena Conquered, receive 6 Grandmaster Scrolls<br>5/5 Arena Conquered
|req4=72000
|effect4=Per Arena Conquered, receive 10 Grandmaster Scrolls<br>5/5 Arena Conquered
}}{{INTELRow
|no=17
|name=Shining
|levels=3
|req1=18000
|effect1=Costume Purple Beads turn to Orange by +1%
|req2=36000
|effect2=Costume Blue Beads turn to Orange by +1%
|req3=54000
|effect3=Costume Green Beads turn to Orange by +1%
}}{{INTELRow
|no=18
|name=Top Makeup Technique
|levels=4
|req1=18000
|effect1=Per orange costume owned, receive 2 Toners<br>64/64 orange costume acquired
|req2=36000
|effect2=Per orange costume owned, receive 4 Toners<br>64/64 orange costume acquired
|req3=54000
|effect3=Per orange costume owned, receive 6 Toners<br>64/64 orange costume acquired
|req4=72000
|effect4=Per orange costume owned, receive 10 Toners<br>64/64 orange costume acquired
}}{{INTELRow
|no=19
|name=Dressing Skill
|levels=4
|req1=18000
|effect1=Goddess Outfit Set effects +5%
|req2=36000
|effect2=Goddess Outift Set effects +10%
|req3=54000
|effect3=Goddess Outift Set effects +15%
|req4=72000
|effect4=Goddess Outift Set effects +20%
}}}}
